title: carex perfusca var. japonoalpina
intro: Carex perfusca var. japonoalpina, also known as Japanese alpine sedge, is a type of perennial grass native to Japan and parts of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Carex perfusca var. japonoalpina include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Carex perfusca var. japonoalpina typically involve infusing the plant in hot water or making a salve with its leaves and stems.
